# Great Lakes Gazette
> Daily Great Lakes freighter and vessel-movement brief: bulk carriers, tankers, and tug-barge traffic across all five lakes, written from Bay City, Michigan by Chris Izworski.

A new edition publishes every morning with a headline, dateline, fleet brief, and vessel spotlight, built from live AIS data, port reports, NOAA water levels, and NWS marine forecasts. The archive is permanent; every back edition has a stable URL at /issue/YYYY-MM-DD.

## Key pages
- [Today's edition](https://gazette.chrisizworski.com/): the current daily brief, fully server-rendered
- [Archive](https://gazette.chrisizworski.com/archive): every back edition, grouped by month
- [RSS feed](https://gazette.chrisizworski.com/feed.xml): the 30 most recent editions with full text included
- [About the author](https://gazette.chrisizworski.com/chris-izworski): Chris Izworski

## Author
Chris Izworski (https://chrisizworski.com), Michigan outdoor writer. Related sites: Michigan Trout Report (https://michigantroutreport.com), Michigan Birding Report (https://michiganbirdingreport.com), Great Lakes Levels (https://greatlakeslevels.org), Freighter View Farms (https://freighterviewfarms.com).
